{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Zenith salvage operation
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Zenith salvage operation]] occurred on the bottom layer of [[Dornoth IV]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
